name: chart-pie-donut-text
visual_summary: A donut pie chart component displaying a text-based value, suitable for showcasing small, single-number statistics within a dashboard or report. It's ideal for use cases where a concise and visually engaging way to represent a single value is required.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready chart component with the following characteristics:

Name: chart-pie-donut-text
Description: A donut pie chart component displaying a text-based value, suitable for showcasing small, single-number statistics within a dashboard or report. It's ideal for use cases where a concise and visually engaging way to represent a single value is required.
Style: modern, minimal
Interactions: draggable, resizable
Tags: dashboard, reporting, chart, data visualization, metric

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
